message: Singing at the end of the world.
She sings.
Proud of the wings she sprouts... an angel sings.
Are our brains wider than the sky?
Look... Put them side by side...
Put the brain beside it and the sky it will include...
The sky... the world... and you beside... it will include, include.
Our brains will include...
Are our brains deeper than the sea?
Look... Hold them, blue to blue...
The sea our brains will absorb...
As sponges, buckets do...
Are our brains heavier than God?
Lift them, pound for pound.
Our brains and God... Measure them, pound for pound.
They're the exact same weight.
Our brains are just the weight of God.
If they do differ
it is as syllable
from sound.
As melody
from song.
I must protect...
The angel that sings.
She sprouts wings... and sings joyfully.
At the end of the world...
"    sama."
"Ple   wa   up."
"Please wa   up."

name: Takuji
message: "Mmmm..."
"Please wake up."

name: Takuji
message: "...Where am I?"
My memory was a little fuzzy...
I always feel like this when I wake up... It's not something I'm worried about.

name: Kimika
message: "This is the ark... Isn't that obvious?"

name: Takuji
message: "The ark?"
Ark? Ark... The school building's foundation is the ark?

name: Takuji
message: "The ark, huh..."
More importantly...

name: Takuji
message: "More importantly..."
What time is it right now?

name: Takuji
message: "What time is it right now?"

name: Kimika
message: "Um, it's just after 6:00 p.m. on the 17th..."
Six o'clock, huh... I slept too long.
Even though I slept so long, I still feel tired.
Well, I always feel like that.

name: Takuji
message: "And last night?"

name: Kimika
message: "Huh?"

name: Takuji
message: "What about last night?"

name: Kimika
message: "Eh? What do you mean?"

name: Takuji
message: "Oh, uh... After I disappeared..."

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, last night? Well, after you went for a walk, they kept going at it like that."

name: Takuji
message: "Like that..."

name: Takuji
message: "What are they doing?"

name: Kimika
message: "Hehehe... They've been going at it for ages."

name: Takuji
message: "Why?"

name: Kimika
message: "What are you talking about? You were the one who ordered them to have sex with Nishimura-kun."

name: Takuji

name: Kimika
message: "That's right. Uh, the reason he's not there is..."

name: Takuji

name: Kimika

name: Takuji

name: Kimika
message: "He's been laying there like that."

name: Takuji
message: "Like that?"

name: Kimika

name: Takuji
message: "He's not moving?"

name: Kimika

name: Takuji
message: "No reaction, huh..."

name: Kimika
message: "Shouldn't you heal him, my savior?"

name: Takuji
message: "There's no need."

name: Kimika
message: "Really?"

name: Takuji
message: "He wanted to have sex so bad. After his wish came true, he didn't need to move anymore. There's no need to heal him."

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, that's right. I remember you saying something like that, my savior."

name: Kimika
message: "I see. So it's all about how he feels."

name: Takuji
message: "Well, I guess so. He stopped moving once his wish was granted. That's all."

name: Kimika
message: "So it's just a question of his willpower now... Hmm, that makes sense."

name: Kimika
message: "Well, even if he was alive, he would just keep having sex. This way is better."

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, it is."

name: Takuji
message: "Still, they haven't even slept. They're not getting bored of it at all."

name: Kimika
message: "They're not getting tired at all thanks to the savior's elixir. It's all-purpose, huh... Look, it even makes your pupils dilate."

message: "Look, look, my savior, look. It makes your pupils dilate, so you can see everything. Even in the darkness you can see perfectly fine."

What is it...

No... It's not like it's rare for me to forget something.
So I must not need to remember it. I can just forget it.

Damn it... Is that why she's so rude? Well, I guess scolding her for it won't really help.
